title: Treacle Hash Cakes
description: A sweet breakfast treat made with crispy hash and gooey treacle syrup.
instructions: 2. In a mixing bowl, combine the hash, treacle syrup, and gooey honey.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the polish rye flour and midnight black sesame seeds.
4. Add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
5. Divide the dough into 4-6 portions, depending on desired size.
6. Shape each portion into a ball and then flatten slightly into a cake.
7. Place the cakes on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
8. Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the cakes are golden brown.
9. Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
10. Serve warm, dust with powdered sugar if desired.
